metadata.title: World Cup 2026 Schedule Calendar | Complete Match Schedule
metadata.description: Complete FIFA World Cup 2026 match schedule (groups & knockouts). Countdown to kickoff. Subscribe to the live calendar on iOS / Android via WebCal — auto-updates as teams advance.

hero.headline: Never miss a single match at the 2026 World Cup.
hero.subheadline: Add the full schedule once. It will automatically update with results and when knockout matchups are confirmed — no manual tracking needed.

calendar.title: Match Schedule
calendar.noMatches: No matches scheduled for this day.
calendar.swipeHint: Select days with gold dots to view matches

benefits.title: Add once. Follow the entire tournament.

items.title: Automatic updates until the final
items.description: Once added, any changes (results, knockout matchups) will automatically appear in your personal calendar.

items.title: Never miss a single match
items.description: No need to manually track or worry about schedule changes. Every match stays up to date automatically.

items.title: Set it up only once
items.description: No more re-importing .ics files. WebCal ensures you always have the latest schedule without any extra work.

items.title: Works inside the calendar app you already use
items.description: Matches appear directly in iPhone Calendar, Google Calendar, or Outlook. No additional apps required.

addToCalendar.fallbackNote: WebCal ensures your calendar automatically receives updates when we change knockout data.

addToCalendarPage.title: Add World Cup 2026 Schedule — Subscribe Once
addToCalendarPage.subtitle: Country flags + automatic knockout team updates
addToCalendarPage.description: Add the schedule once via WebCal or Google Calendar. After the group stage ends, advancing teams will automatically appear in your calendar. No need to re-import .ics files ever again.
addToCalendarPage.step1: Click the add button (iPhone, Google, or copy the link).
addToCalendarPage.step2: Your calendar connects once via WebCal (or Google subscribe).
addToCalendarPage.step3: After groups: live data updates → knockout matches show real team names + flag emojis.
addToCalendarPage.step4: Never re-import again. Updates all the way to the final.

calendar.title: Add once, stay updated forever.
calendar.description: After the group stage, advancing teams will automatically appear in your calendar. Subscribe once via WebCal — no need to re-import.
calendar.timezoneNote: Times shown in your local timezone ({tz})
calendar.viewFullSchedule: View full schedule on Match Schedule page
calendar.note: Calendar uses your local timezone ({tz}). Past days are dimmed.
calendar.monthDesc: View matches by month. Click a day with matches for quick details.

teamsPage.title: Participating national teams
teamsPage.description: Detailed information on all 48 teams (coach, key players, home stadiums, background). Data is updated based on real FIFA situation. Click a team card to see their matches.
